title: Initialize project structure
description: Setup Electron + Vite + Vue 3 + TypeScript boilerplate. Ensure basic dev server and desktop window run successfully.

title: Configure dependencies and store
description: Install and setup TailwindCSS for styling and Pinia for frontend state management.

title: Implement core Texas Hold'em engine
description: Create TypeScript classes/functions for Deck, Card, Hand Evaluation, and core Game State (pots, betting rounds).

title: Implement IPC and Config Management
description: Set up IPC bridge between Electron main and renderer processes. Create basic file saving/loading for configurations.

title: Create Match Configuration UI
description: Build Vue components for setting up a match: number of players, starting chips, and assigning AI models/Human to seats.

title: Implement LLM Service Integration
description: In the Electron main process, create services to format game state into prompts and communicate with LLM APIs to get actions.

title: Create Game Board UI
description: Build Vue components to visualize the poker table, community cards, player seats, hole cards, and current bets.

title: Create Human Action Panel UI
description: Build Vue components for human players to input actions (Fold, Check, Call, Raise).

title: Integrate Game Loop
description: Connect the UI, Game Engine, and LLM services to run a complete hand, manage turns, and handle side pots.

title: Final Polish and Logging
description: Add an Event Log UI, handle API errors gracefully, and perform basic integration testing.
